title: Cobblemon MEGA Evolution
description: Cobblemon with my personal twist (MEGAs, Z-Moves, Dynamax, Terastalization, etc). Perfect for a server with friends!
body:
**Cobblemon MEGA Evolution (Cobblemon 1.7 “Set Course!”)**

Cobblemon MEGA Evolution is a Fabric-based modpack that combines Cobblemon with a curated set of performance, immersion, and quality‑of‑life mods to deliver a smooth, feature‑rich Pokémon‑inspired Minecraft experience. This pack is currently a work in progress (WIP), tuned for stability and long‑term play.

- 🐉 Cobblemon + Mega Showdown
Catch, battle, and evolve Pokémon with expanded mechanics, including Mega Evolutions for deeper strategy.
- ⚡ Performance Boosters
Lithium, Sodium, Krypton, FerriteCore, and ImmediatelyFast ensure optimized gameplay and consistent frame rates.
- 🎨 Immersion Mods
Iris shaders, LambDynamicLights, Presence Footsteps, Visuality, and SereneSeasons enrich the world’s visuals and atmosphere.
- 🛠️ Quality of Life
Traveler’s Backpack, Lootr, Tree Harvester, Crafting Tweaks, and Replanting Crops streamline exploration, building, and survival.
- 🎶 Atmosphere Enhancers
Immersive Melodies, Melody, and Particle Effects add dynamic soundscapes and visual flair to everyday gameplay.
- 🧩 Compatibility Libraries
Architectury, Balm, Konkrete, Owo, YACL, and others provide a stable foundation for smooth mod integration.

This pack is designed for collectors, battlers, and adventurers who want the thrill of Pokémon gameplay inside a polished Minecraft world. With performance mods keeping things stable, immersion mods enriching the environment, and quality‑of‑life features smoothing progression, Cobblemon MEGA Evolution offers a balanced and engaging experience for both casual and dedicated players.
